news.title: IRDAI Seeks Comments on Rs 800 Crore Policyholders' Education and Protection Fund Regulations
news.summary: IRDAI issued a consultation paper on the proposed regulatory framework for the Rs 800 crore Policyholders' Education and Protection Fund.

news.title: Life Insurance Sector Begins FY27 with 16.6% NBP Growth
news.summary: India's life insurance sector began FY27 with robust new business premiums growing 16.6%, with private insurers' share nearing 40%.

news.title: ICICI Lombard Q1 FY27: Profit Slumps 46% on Large Fire Claims, Motor TP Verdict
news.summary: ICICI Lombard reported a 46% YoY decline in Q1 FY27 net profit to Rs 403 crore, hit by large fire claims and the Supreme Court's Motor TP verdict.

news.title: HDFC Life & ICICI Pru Q1 FY27: Double-Digit Profit Growth
news.summary: HDFC Life reported Q1 FY27 PAT of Rs 611 crore (+12%), while ICICI Pru posted PAT of Rs 386 crore (+27.8%), with retail protection APE surging 60.4%.

news.title: Standalone Health Insurers Surge 30.9% in June
news.summary: Standalone health insurers posted 30.9% YoY growth in June 2026 premiums, with Care Health leading at 41.9% growth and market share reaching 16.1%.

news.title: IRDAI Set to Review Third-Party Motor Insurance Rates
news.summary: IRDAI is set to conduct its first major review of third-party motor insurance rates in years, as insurers face heavy underwriting losses in the segment.

news.title: Non-Life Premiums Grow 16% in June, Highest in 5 Months
news.summary: Non-life insurance GDPI grew 15.9% in June 2026 to Rs 24,195 crore, the highest monthly growth in five months, with SAHIs leading at 30.9%.

news.title: Travel Insurance Adoption Up 22% in 2026
news.summary: Travel insurance adoption rose 22% YoY in 2026, with 40% of travellers choosing emerging destinations and non-medical claims outnumbering medical 4:1.

news.title: EV Policy Issuance Surges 670% in FY26
news.summary: Electric vehicle insurance policy issuance surged 670% between FY25 and FY26, though EVs remain barely 1% of the insured vehicle fleet.

news.title: IRDAI Links Insurance KMP Pay to Customer Outcomes, Mandates Public Disclosures
news.summary: IRDAI amended corporate governance norms to link KMP remuneration to customer-centric metrics including claim settlement speed, grievance redressal, and product performance.

news.title: 14+ Insurers File Telematics Products for Commercial Fleets
news.summary: At least 14 general insurers have filed PAYD/PHYD telematics products for commercial fleets, with early deployments showing 15–28% frequency reduction.

news.title: LIC Q4 FY26: Net Profit Surges 23% to Rs 23,467 Crore, Board Declares Rs 10 Dividend and 1:1 Bonus
news.summary: LIC reported a 23% YoY rise in Q4 net profit to Rs 23,467 crore, with FY26 PAT reaching a record Rs 57,419 crore. The board declared a Rs 10/share dividend and a 1:1 bonus issue.

news.title: New India Assurance Q4: Profit Jumps 61% to Rs 558 Crore on Investment Income
news.summary: New India Assurance reported 61% YoY growth in Q4 PAT to Rs 558 crore. FY26 PAT rose 40% to Rs 1,384 crore.

news.title: Standalone Health Insurers Lead with 17.89% Premium Growth as Health Awareness Rises
news.summary: Standalone health insurers recorded 17.89% growth with premium collections of Rs 35,815 crore up to January 2026.

news.title: India's Insurance Penetration Stable at 3.7% as Density Improves Marginally to USD 97
news.summary: India's insurance penetration remained at 3.7% in FY2024-25 while insurance density increased from USD 95 to USD 97.

news.title: Motor TP Premiums Rise 9.3% in FY26, Outpacing OD
news.summary: Third-party motor insurance premiums rose 9.3% in FY26, outpacing own-damage growth of 9%, as stricter enforcement drives TP compliance across India.

news.title: 100% FDI in Insurance: Global Insurers Line Up to Enter Indian Market
news.summary: With the SBSR Act enabling 100% FDI from February 2026, several global insurers are exploring increased stakes in their Indian subsidiaries.

news.title: SBI General Insurance Crosses Rs 15,000 Crore GDP Milestone in FY26
news.summary: SBI General Insurance crossed Rs 15,000 crore in gross direct premium for the first time with 14.5% growth, outpacing the industry by 1.6 times.

news.title: SBI Life FY26: NBP Grows 20% to Rs 42,550 Crore, VNB Margin Holds at 27.5%
news.summary: SBI Life reported 20% NBP growth to Rs 42,550 crore with VNB margins at the upper end of guidance. GWP crossed Rs 1 lakh crore for the first time.

news.title: Mid-Tier Life Insurers Gain Ground: Retail Premium Growth Outpaces Top 5 Players
news.summary: IRDAI's FY26 premium data reveals mid-tier insurers growing at 15.7% in retail premium, delivering 83% of the top-tier's retail gain.

news.title: HDFC Life FY26: PAT Grows 6% to Rs 1,910 Crore, Retail Protection Up 43%
news.summary: HDFC Life reported FY26 PAT of Rs 1,910 crore (+6%), with retail protection growing 43% and AUM crossing Rs 3.75 lakh crore.

news.title: ICICI Lombard Q4: GDPI Growth Surges 18.2%, Health Insurance Leads at 38.2%
news.summary: ICICI Lombard reported 18.2% GDPI growth in Q4 FY26, nearly double the industry rate. Retail health insurance premiums surged 55.6%.

news.title: GST Exemption on Health Insurance Drives Premium Surge in H2FY26
news.summary: The GST exemption on retail health insurance policies from September 2025 significantly boosted health insurance premiums in H2FY26.

news.title: ICICI Prudential Life FY26: PAT Surges 35% to Rs 1,600 Crore
news.summary: ICICI Prudential Life reported a 34.6% jump in FY26 PAT to Rs 1,600 crore, with VNB growing 10.9% and VNB margin expanding 193 bps to 24.7%.

news.title: CareEdge: Non-Life Sector to Grow 8–11% Over Medium Term
news.summary: CareEdge projects non-life premium growth of 8–11% over the medium term, with health premiums expected to reach Rs 1.40 lakh crore by FY27.

news.title: CareEdge: Non-Life Insurance Sector Grew 8.6% in FY26, Health Insurance Leads Growth
news.summary: CareEdge reported that the non-life insurance sector grew 8.6% in FY26, with health insurance emerging as the primary growth driver.

news.title: Non-Life Insurers Log 9.3% Premium Growth in FY26 Amid GST Relief
news.summary: The non-life insurance industry reported 9.3% YoY growth to Rs 3.36 trillion in FY26, aided by the health insurance segment after GST rate rationalisation.

news.title: IRDAI Grants 12-Month Ind AS Forbearance to Insurers
news.summary: IRDAI granted a 12-month forbearance period for insurers transitioning to Ind AS, requiring quarterly proforma financials and parallel reporting for two years.

news.title: IRDAI Notifies Ind AS Implementation Framework for Insurers, Effective April 1, 2026
news.summary: IRDAI issued the final framework for Ind AS 117 implementation, mandating parallel reporting for two years and a one-year forbearance option.

news.title: Ind AS 117 Comes Into Effect: New Accounting Standard Transforms Insurance Financial Reporting
news.summary: Ind AS 117 came into effect from April 2026, fundamentally changing how insurers recognise revenue, report profits, and communicate financial performance.

news.title: Allianz Jio Reinsurance Commences Operations
news.summary: Allianz Jio Reinsurance has formally commenced operations after receiving final IRDAI approval on March 12, 2026.

news.title: IRDAI Approves Allianz Jio Reinsurance and Kiwi General Insurance at 134th Meeting
news.summary: IRDAI granted certificates of registration to Allianz Jio Reinsurance (50:50 JV between Jio Financial and Allianz) and Kiwi General Insurance.

news.title: IRDAI Reviews Insurance Sector Performance; Total Premium Collections Reach Rs 10.51 Lakh Crore
news.summary: At its 134th meeting, IRDAI reviewed industry performance noting total premium collections of Rs 10.51 lakh crore with 11.45% growth.

news.title: RBI Proposes Stricter Bancassurance Norms: Two-Tier Model for Banks Selling Insurance
news.summary: RBI issued draft directions for bancassurance, creating a clear separation between agency (fee-based distribution) and referral (one-time referral fee) models.

news.title: LIC Q3 FY26: Cons PAT Jumps 17% to Rs 12,930 Crore
news.summary: LIC reported a 17% YoY jump in Q3 FY26 consolidated PAT to Rs 12,930 crore, with AUM growing 8% to Rs 59.17 lakh crore.

news.title: Sabka Bima Sabki Raksha Act Comes Into Effect: 100% FDI in Insurance Now Operational
news.summary: The Sabka Bima Sabki Raksha Act came into force, raising the FDI limit to 100% and introducing enhanced policyholder protection measures.

news.title: Govt Proposes Age-Linked TP Premium Formula in Budget 2026
news.summary: The government proposed linking third-party motor insurance premiums to vehicle age, with lower rates for new vehicles and higher rates for older ones.

news.title: Swiss Re Forecasts India as Fastest-Growing Major Insurance Market at 6.9% CAGR Over 2026-2030
news.summary: Swiss Re projects Indian insurance premium growth to accelerate to 6.9% over 2026-2030, outpacing China, the US and Western European markets.

news.title: Tier 2/3 Regions Account for 62% New Health Policies
news.summary: Tier 2/3 regions now account for 62% of new health insurance policies, with Rs 10–15 lakh sum insured becoming the most common coverage band.

news.title: IRDAI 133rd Meeting: Key Regulatory Outcomes
news.summary: At its 133rd meeting, IRDAI noted total industry premium of Rs 8.02 lakh crore up to November 2025 and approved the RBC framework for drafting.

news.title: LIC Q2 FY26: Net Profit Jumps 31% to Rs 10,098 Crore
news.summary: LIC reported a 31% YoY jump in Q2 FY26 net profit to Rs 10,098 crore, with H1 VNB growing 12.3% and net premiums rising 5.4%.

news.title: CBIC Clarifies ITC Reversal for Insurance Commissions
news.summary: CBIC ruled that insurers cannot claim input tax credit on commissions paid for individual insurance policies, though reinsurance services remain exempt.

news.title: LIC Q1 FY26: PAT Grows 5% to Rs 10,986 Crore, VNB Surges 21%
news.summary: LIC reported a 5% YoY rise in Q1 FY26 PAT to Rs 10,986 crore, with VNB surging 20.75% and VNB margin expanding 150 bps to 15.4%.

blogs.title: Bima Sugam Countdown: What to Expect as Full Launch Nears
blogs.summary: Bima Sugam's full transactional launch is expected by end-September 2026. The zero-commission digital marketplace could reshape insurance distribution.

blogs.title: ICICI Lombard Q1 FY27: Fire Losses, Motor Reserves, and the Profit Squeeze
blogs.summary: ICICI Lombard's Q1 profit slumped 46% as large fire claims and the Supreme Court's Motor TP verdict hit earnings. Analysis of whether this is a one-off or a warning sign.

blogs.title: GST ITC Impact on Insurers: 10 Months On
blogs.summary: Ten months after the GST exemption on health insurance, the input tax credit (ITC) loss is unevenly distributed — Niva Bupa absorbed ~4%, Star Health ~1%, and Care Health ~2%. Net customer benefit stands at 12-15%.

blogs.title: Non-Life Insurance June 2026: Growth Accelerates to 16%
blogs.summary: June 2026 GDPI hit Rs 24,195 crore, up 15.9% YoY. Standalone health insurers led the charge at 30.9% growth, with Care (+41.9%) and Niva (+34.3%) posting exceptional numbers.

blogs.title: Travel Insurance in India: Rising Adoption and Changing Patterns
blogs.summary: Travel insurance adoption in India grew 22% year-on-year in 2026. Non-medical claims dominate at 4:1, senior traveler share hit 22%, and under-18 purchases surged 56%.

blogs.title: Home Insurance: India's Biggest Protection Gap
blogs.summary: Only 1 in 20 Indian households has any form of home insurance. With reconstruction costs at Rs 1,200-1,500 per square foot and 5,000+ fire cases annually in Mumbai alone, the protection gap is enormous.

blogs.title: EV Insurance in India: The Complete Guide
blogs.summary: EV policy issuance surged 670% between FY25 and FY26, yet electric vehicles remain barely 1% of India's insured fleet. Premiums are 20-40% higher than petrol equivalents. Here's why, and what's changing.

blogs.title: LIC Q4 FY26 Deep Dive: Record Profit, Surging VNB, and the Margin Story
blogs.summary: LIC reported a record Rs 57,419 crore PAT for FY26 with VNB surging 42%. A deep dive into the performance of India's largest life insurer.

blogs.title: ICICI Lombard FY26: Health-Led Growth Story Gains Momentum
blogs.summary: ICICI Lombard's Q4 GDPI surged 18.2% — nearly double the industry rate — driven by retail health insurance growing 54%.

blogs.title: Health Insurance Trends Reshaping India in 2026
blogs.summary: Health insurance premiums grew 14.41% in FY26 driven by GST exemption and rising healthcare awareness.

blogs.title: SBI Life FY26: Steady Growth, Margin Resilience, and Distribution Strength
blogs.summary: SBI Life delivered 20% NBP growth with VNB margins at 27.5% — the upper end of guidance. A detailed analysis of the insurer's FY26 performance.

blogs.title: New India Assurance Q4: Profit Jumps 61% but Underwriting Concerns Persist
blogs.summary: New India Assurance reported a 61% jump in Q4 profit, but the combined ratio worsened to 118.34% as wage revision costs of Rs 3,525 crore masked underlying weakness.

blogs.title: IRDAI's Regulatory Reforms: A New Era for Indian Insurance
blogs.summary: From 100% FDI to risk-based capital norms, IRDAI's regulatory overhaul is reshaping the Indian insurance sector.

blogs.title: SBI General Insurance Crosses Rs 15,000 Crore GDP: A Growth Milestone
blogs.summary: SBI General Insurance achieved a historic milestone, crossing Rs 15,000 crore in gross direct premium for the first time with 14.5% growth.

blogs.title: IRDAI's New KMP Governance: Why Your Insurance CEO's Pay Now Depends on Your Claim Experience
blogs.summary: IRDAI has linked insurance executive compensation to customer outcomes — claim settlement speed, grievance redressal, and product performance.

blogs.title: Telematics in Motor Insurance: PAYD and PHYD Explained
blogs.summary: 14+ insurers have filed telematics-based motor insurance products with IRDAI. From Pay-As-You-Drive to Pay-How-You-Drive, here's how usage-based insurance is reshaping motor underwriting.

blogs.title: Life Insurance FY26: Mid-Tier Challengers Reshape the Market
blogs.summary: IRDAI's FY2025-26 premium data reveals a structural shift as mid-tier insurers grow at 15.7% in retail premium, challenging the dominance of the Top 5 players.

blogs.title: Cyber Insurance in India: A Rapidly Growing Market Taking Shape
blogs.summary: India's cyber insurance market is projected to grow at 28% CAGR to reach USD 8.8 billion by 2034, driven by DPDP Act compliance and rising ransomware threats.

blogs.title: Non-Life Insurance: 9.3% Growth in FY26 Amid Regulatory Shifts
blogs.summary: The non-life insurance sector grew 9.3% to Rs 3.36 trillion in FY26, driven by health insurance and GST relief.

blogs.title: Ind AS 117: The Accounting Revolution Reshaping Indian Insurance
blogs.summary: Ind AS 117 came into effect from April 2026, fundamentally changing how insurers recognise revenue, report profits, and communicate financial performance.

blogs.title: GST Exemption on Insurance: Analysing the Impact Six Months On
blogs.summary: Six months since the GST exemption on life and health insurance policies came into effect, we analyse the impact on premium growth and affordability.

blogs.title: Risk-Based Capital in India: What It Means for Insurers and Policyholders
blogs.summary: India's shift to a risk-based capital regime from April 2026 will fundamentally change how insurers price risk, allocate capital, and report profits.

blogs.title: Private Life Insurers FY26: SBI Life vs HDFC Life vs ICICI Pru
blogs.summary: SBI Life, HDFC Life, and ICICI Prudential delivered divergent FY26 results. We break down the numbers — PAT growth, VNB margins, valuations, and where each stock trades relative to embedded value.

blogs.title: India's Rising Position in the Global Insurance Landscape
blogs.summary: India is now the 10th largest insurance market globally with 1.8% market share. Swiss Re forecasts India will be the fastest-growing major insurance market over 2026-2030.

blogs.title: Motor Insurance in India: Navigating Change in 2026
blogs.summary: Motor insurance, the largest segment in India's general insurance industry, is undergoing significant changes with GST rationalisation and regulatory shifts.

blogs.title: Digital Transformation in Indian Insurance: From Insurtech to AI
blogs.summary: Technology is reshaping every aspect of the insurance value chain in India, from underwriting to claims management and customer engagement.

blogs.title: Motor Insurance: TP vs OD Growth Dynamics in FY26
blogs.summary: Motor TP premiums grew 9.3% in FY26, slightly outpacing OD at 9% — a reversal of the post-pandemic trend. Enforcement-driven compliance and the VAHAN digital verification system are transforming the motor insurance landscape.

blogs.title: Insurance for All by 2047: Assessing India's Progress
blogs.summary: IRDAI's ambitious vision of 'Insurance for All by 2047' is gaining momentum. An assessment of progress, challenges, and the road ahead.

blogs.title: Crop Insurance in India: Addressing the Agricultural Protection Gap
blogs.summary: Crop insurance premiums declined 43.6% in FY26, highlighting the challenges in India's agricultural insurance framework.

blogs.title: Motor TP Premium Reform: What Vehicle Owners Need to Know
blogs.summary: A 10-25% hike in Motor Third Party premiums is on the table — the first increase in six years. Here's what it means for car and commercial vehicle owners.

blogs.title: ICRA Insurance Outlook FY27: Growth Drivers and Risks
blogs.summary: ICRA projects non-life GDPI growth of 9.7-10.6% in FY27, with health insurance as the primary driver. Motor TP revision could add 2-3 percentage points. Industry GDPI projected at Rs 3.56-3.59 trillion.

blogs.title: Allianz Jio Reinsurance: Reshaping India's Reinsurance Market
blogs.summary: The Allianz-Jio Financial Services 50:50 joint venture for reinsurance has received IRDAI approval, marking the first license issued under Chairman Ajay Seth. India's reinsurance market is now crowded with over 30 players.

blogs.title: Tier 2/3 India: The New Frontier for Insurance
blogs.summary: 62% of new health insurance policies in 2025-26 came from Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities. EMI options, post-COVID awareness, and digital distribution are driving adoption in India's insurance hinterland.
